# services.kapacitor

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.kapacitor`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.kapacitor.alerta.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable kapacitor alerta integration. |
| `services.kapacitor.alerta.environment` | `string` | Default Alerta environment |
| `services.kapacitor.alerta.origin` | `string` | Default origin of alert |
| `services.kapacitor.alerta.token` | `string` | Default Alerta authentication token |
| `services.kapacitor.alerta.url` | `string` | The URL to the Alerta REST API |
| `services.kapacitor.bind` | `string` | Address to bind to. The default is to bind to all addresses |
| `services.kapacitor.dataDir` | `absolute path` | Location where Kapacitor stores its state |
| `services.kapacitor.defaultDatabase.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable kapacitor.defaultDatabase. |
| `services.kapacitor.defaultDatabase.password` | `string` | The password to connect to the remote InfluxDB server |
| `services.kapacitor.defaultDatabase.url` | `string` | The URL to an InfluxDB server that serves as the default database |
| `services.kapacitor.defaultDatabase.username` | `string` | The username to connect to the remote InfluxDB server |
| `services.kapacitor.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable kapacitor. |
| `services.kapacitor.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | These lines go into kapacitord.conf verbatim. |
| `services.kapacitor.group` | `string` | Group under which Kapacitor runs |
| `services.kapacitor.loadDirectory` | `null or absolute path` | Directory where to load services from, such as tasks, templates and handlers (or null to disable service loading on startup) |
| `services.kapacitor.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port of Kapacitor |
| `services.kapacitor.taskSnapshotInterval` | `string` | Specifies how often to snapshot the task state (in InfluxDB time units) |
| `services.kapacitor.user` | `string` | User account under which Kapacitor runs |
